/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/TheMadCatter.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/TheMadCatter.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TheMadCatter.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TheMadCatter.dir/src/SaveSystem.cpp.o -o TheMadCatter  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lpthread /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libGLU.so /usr/lib64/librt.a -lm -ldl -lm /usr/lib64/libX11.so /usr/lib64/libXext.so
